content.en:
Gods and demons.

This world is located in an ancient battlefield at the intersection of the Protoss and the Demons, and it is a sealed area.

The Protoss and the Demon Race occupy two more prosperous areas in the center of the universe, with a large number of star fields, and some star fields are very close to each other, so there are many conflicts and often wars.

And this ancient battlefield was caused by a great war for a long time, and that great war affected the gods and demons, exposing the location of the gods and demons, which was discovered by the gods and demons.

After that, the Protoss and the Demon Race fought again and again because of the belonging of the God and Demon Heaven, and in the end, in order not to cause greater losses, the two sides jointly ruled the God and Demon Heaven, and each sent a supreme guard to the God and Demon Heaven to prevent other races from sneaking into the God and Demon Heaven.

If it was usual, let alone Ye Tian, even the Kunwu Supreme would not dare to come here, otherwise he would be besieged by many Supreme Beings of the God Clan, and it would be difficult for him to escape.

"It's here!"

Kunwu Supreme Ye Tian walked all the way through the ancient battlefield and came to a twin mountain.

The twin mountains stood in the void, very large, and on both mountains there was a magnificent temple inhabited by two supreme beings.

This Twin Mountains was moved by the Protoss and the Demon Race, and as a habitat for the two supremes, it was also convenient to guard this place.

As soon as Ye Tian and Kunwu Supreme approached here, the Supreme of the Gods and Demons who were guarding here discovered it.

Rushing!!

The Supreme of the Protoss and the Demon Race came out of the Twin Mountains and stood in the void, staring at the Kungo Supreme.

"Terran Kungo Supreme!"

Two supreme ways.

"It turned out to be the Baotian Supreme of the Protoss and the Troll Supreme of the Demon Race!"

Kunwu Supreme said lightly, his tone was not too restrained, and he was obviously not afraid of these two supremes.

The supreme is also divided into strong and weak, but the strength of the Kunwu supreme is much, much stronger than these two supremes, so naturally he is not afraid of these two.

And the Baotian Supreme and the Troll Supreme are naturally not afraid of the Kunwu Supreme because of their identity.

"We know your intentions, we will open the God and Demon Heaven later, but one thing to remember, don't try to open the time talent to speed up the time, otherwise once we sense that the consumption speed of the Dao God and Demon Heaven is much faster, we can immediately arrest you out!"

Baotian Supreme Dao.

"Understood!"

Ye Tian also knew that the Protoss and the Demon Race would not allow the time to be accelerated wantonly and spend more time in the Protégé and Demon Heaven, in that case, if too much of the special energy of the Protégé and Demon Heaven was consumed, then the Protégé and Demon Celestial would be wasted, and it would take a long time to recover.

"Wait here!"

Baotian Supreme and Troll Tianzun flew into the Twin Mountains again.

Soon, a terrifying force came from the Twin Mountains, distorting the void in this area.

Then, a passage appeared in the void, and it was a passage to the gods and demons.

"Let's go inside!"

The voices of the Baotian Supreme and the Troll Supreme came.

"Kungo Supreme, I'm in!"

Ye Tian looked at the Kunwu Supreme.

"Go ahead, I'll wait for you here for ten years!" Kun Wu Supreme said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded, turned around and flew towards the passage, entering the God and Demon Heaven.

......

Gods and demons.

Ye Tian stood on the ground here, breathing in the breath here.

"Is this the Heaven of Gods and Demons?"

Ye Tian asked himself.

Soon, he discovered the specialness of the gods and demons.

It seems to fit easily into the avenue, and everything seems to merge with the avenue.

Immediately, he unleashed the power of his Chaos Dao, and an astonishing picture appeared in front of his eyes.

Rumble!!!!

A chaotic sea emerged, and it was Ye Tian's chaotic sea law appearance.

Then, the Chaos Sea Law Phase began to change, evolving towards a higher level, and it perfectly showed the direction of Ye Tian's future avenue.

I saw that the chaotic sea was compressing, and the originally boundless chaotic sea slowly evolved into a small sea, a lake, and finally turned into an ancient well.

Then, an origin was slowly born in the ancient well-

"Origin Realm, this is the Origin Realm in the Chaos Dao! I see, after my Law Aspect Realm, the Chaos Sea is constantly compressed. Different people's Fa is different, and their cultivation direction is also different, and this scene in front of me is my cultivation direction!"

Ye Tian was completely enlightened.

But even if you understand this, it is not easy to compress the Chaos Sea Law Phase, you need to understand to be able to compress it, not like immortal power, you can compress it casually.

But in the Heaven of Gods and Demons, Ye Tian's Law Phase Realm was perfectly presented, and Ye Tian could comprehend its compressed details when he observed this picture, and truly comprehended the essence of the Chaos Sea Law Phase Realm.

This time, even if he couldn't break through to the Origin Realm in one fell swoop, he was able to make great progress in his Chaos Sea Law Realm.

"Let's use the next ten years to take a good look at it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Sit cross-legged and begin your formal cultivation.

Time passed day by day, Ye Tian continued to comprehend, and gradually understood the method of compressing the chaotic sea law phase, and the chaotic sea law phase began to compress.

Although the area of the Chaos Sea Law Phase is getting smaller and smaller, it is becoming more and more condensed, just like the power of the Chaos Dao has been condensed and compressed, and it is getting stronger and stronger than before.

Three years later, Ye Tian successfully compressed the Chaos Sea Law Phase to the size of a small sea, which was equivalent to the middle stage of the Law Phase Realm.

Then, Ye Tian continued to work hard.

Finally, seven years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian made a breakthrough again, and the Chaos Sea Law Phase was compressed to the size of a lake, which was already equivalent to the late stage of the Chaos Sea Law Phase Realm.

There is only one step left, and that is to compress to the size of an ancient well, form an origin, and step into the realm of origin.

But this step was not so easy, Ye Tian did not have the slightest confidence to be able to step in in a short period of time.

Time passed slowly, and three years passed in the blink of an eye.

"Ten years have passed! It's a pity that I haven't condensed the origin of the Great Dao yet!"

Ye Tian sighed.

He had already compressed the Chaos Sea Law Phase to a level close to the Ancient Well, which was already equivalent to the limit of the Chaos Sea Law Phase Realm, and was only one step away from the Origin Realm.

But this step is very far away, it is difficult to break, and it will take a long time or chance.

You must know that some weak supremes are only in the Dharma realm, and only those powerful supremes have reached the origin realm.

Therefore, this step is not so easy!

"It's enough, this chance has made my Chaos Law Realm soar, and it has also made my strength soar a lot!"

Ye Tian showed a happy smile.

At this moment, the void was turbulent, and a large hand grabbed in.

The next moment.

Ye Tian appeared in the outside world and had already left the God and Demon Heaven.

And standing in front of him were the Baotian Supreme, the Troll Tianzun, and the Kunwu Supreme.

"Ye Tian, let's go back to the human race!"

Kunwu Supreme came over and said.

"Yes, Kungo Supreme!"

Ye Tian nodded.
